loop1.title: Energy Input & Distribution
loop1.note: Showing total active power and energy for all outgoing feeders; per-feeder utilization is not measured as rated capacity is unknown for these assets.

loop1.title: Energy Flow Diagram
loop1.note: Showing total active power and energy delta for the panel's PRIMARY outgoing feeders (UPS, BPDB). Incomers (Solar) and some UPS feeders (GIC-02-N6, GIC-02-N7) are dark (no live data) and render as blanks.
